$_comment: BAD EXAMPLE: Headlines describe topics instead of takeaways. Evidence queries are vague single-word terms. Template choices are generic.
$_failures: headline='Revenue Performance' is a topic, not a takeaway. Should be: 'Revenue Hit $29M, Up 18% YoY'
headline='Margins' is a single word. Should convey the insight: 'Gross Margin Expanded 210bps to 64.4%'
headline='Summary' adds no value. Should state the closing action: 'Q1 Strong — Two Actions Needed Now'
message='This slide covers revenue' is a meta-description. Should summarize the actual content.
evidence_queries=['revenue'] is a single vague word. Should specify metric, period, and comparison.
No agenda slide — deck jumps from title to content without framing the narrative
All content slides use headline.evidence — no variety. Revenue metrics should use kpi.big.
No template_key diversity suggests the planner ignored content shape entirely
